// note: Typecheck the Worker test suite (test/). NOT part of the build — it runs in CI's `portal` job (appended to the `typecheck` script) so a TS regression in the security-critical worker tests fails CI. vitest itself esbuild-transpiles tests and does NOT type-check them, so without this the auth/role assertions in test/admin.test.ts would be unchecked. The `cloudflare:test` ambient module is declared in @cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers/types/cloudflare-test.d.ts, included explicitly because the package's main types entry doesn't re-export it.
